calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jun-29-2020 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jun-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Ferrucci appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

The Court stated that it thinks the will should be admitted. Mr. Ferrucci stated that the Beneficiary waived bond. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for January 13, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Continued To Jul-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Continued To Jul-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-14-2018 Continued To Jun-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Ferrucci for Petitioner

Mr. Ferrucci stated that they could not find any court order of name change, the name was changed over 12 years ago, will file an amended petition, and re-issue notice. The Petition for Probate of Lost Will, etc. is continued to June 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of and amended petition.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Continued To May-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-26-2018 Continued To Apr-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Ferrucci for Petitioner.

Mr. Ferrucci stated that the Decedent was transgender and had a name change in 2005, that there had to be a Court order because the Decedent's social security, driver license and passport were changed, and that he has not found an order in San Francisco. Mr. Ferrucci also stated that he believes he should not have to provide notice under the old name, and that the Decedent also lived in San Mateo and Los Angeles. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed is continued to April 30, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: B. Wan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Continued To Mar-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-29-2018 Continued To Feb-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
